windows.embed_text_v2: unpacking and arranging amber glass fragrance oil bottles from black box onto wooden workbench, empty amber candle jars, candle-making kit box, prepping scents, hands no face
windows.summary_v2: A maker unboxes and lines up small amber glass fragrance-oil bottles on a wooden workbench, prepping ingredients beside empty candle jars before making candles.

tags_v2.action: unboxing and lining up fragrance oil bottles

seconds_v2.desc: At a wooden workbench, hands open a small black box of fragrance oils; a cluster of labeled amber glass bottles, empty amber candle jars, and a white kit box already sit on the bench.
A hand lifts one amber fragrance-oil bottle from the black box while the group of bottles waits on the wood beside the empty candle jars.
One amber bottle has been set out front-left on the bench as the hands keep unpacking more from the box.
Two amber fragrance bottles now stand in front; hands continue removing bottles from the black packaging box.
Hands pull another bottle from the box; two bottles are lined up in front near the larger group and empty jars at right.
The maker arranges the box; the front row of amber oil bottles and the main cluster sit on the workbench beside empty amber jars.
Hands tidy the now-emptier black box while several amber fragrance bottles stand grouped on the wooden surface.
Static-ish view of the bench: front row of amber oil bottles, larger bottle cluster, empty candle jars, stir stick and white kit box.
A hand sets down more amber bottles, lining up about six fragrance-oil bottles in front beside the rest, jars and melter waiting at right.

windows.embed_text_v2: displaying finished labeled amber glass jar candles on wooden workbench, center jar lit with single flame, fragrance oil bottles and heat gun nearby, finished product reveal
windows.summary_v2: Maker steps away from a workbench lined with finished labeled amber jar candles, leaving a wide shot with one center candle burning as a display of completed products.

seconds_v2.desc: Maker stands behind a wooden workbench lined with several finished amber glass jar candles with cream labels; one centered jar is lit, hands resting on the bench (no face shown). Heat gun and fragrance oil bottles flank the scene.
Same scene, maker's torso (plaid shirt) and hand visible behind a row of finished labeled amber jar candles; center jar burning.
Maker has stepped slightly back, lit center candle still glowing in the row of amber jars on the workbench.
Maker fully exits frame; the row of labeled amber jar candles remains with the center jar burning.
Wide shot of the finished labeled candles on the workbench; one jar in the middle still burning, fragrance bottles and tools around the edges.
Same wide shot, lit center jar candle continues to burn beside the labeled jars 'Pumpkin' style and 'Caramel App...' visible on labels.
Workbench view of the labeled amber jar candles; center jar burning steadily, scene unchanged.
Same wide shot of finished labeled amber jar candles, center jar lit, brand label visible on the foreground jars.
Wide shot persists with the lit center jar candle and the row of labeled finished amber jars.
